{{Quote|I need you to go to Corellia and capture the Bez'ox Mentzz. The load of atmospheric inhibitors is mine but the shipping company won't send them to me.|[[Droz]]|<ref name="SWG:ItSP">{{SWGcite|exp=JtL|type=space|Inspect the Shifty Prince|Dantooine system}}</ref>}}
The '''''Bez'ox Mentzz''''' was a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] in use during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
{{Quote|The Bez'ox Mentzz should be jumping in any moment now. Intercept and capture that freighter. Those supplies are important to us.|Droz|<ref name="SWG:CtBM" />}}
In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> the ''Bez'ox Mentzz'' was traveling through the rich shipping lanes of the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]], transporting [[atmospheric inhibitor]]s. It was escorted by mercenaries piloting [[BTL Y-wing starfighter|Y-wing starfighters]]. Just as the crew was preparing to jump into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], the freighter was intercepted and their escort was shot down by a spacer in a heavily armed ship. The spacer had been hired by the the [[Droz|station master]] of the [[Dantooine Space Station]] to secure the cargo for him. Threatened by the firepower of the spacer's ship, the freighter's crew surrendered and followed him to a rendezvous point where their cargo was transferred.<ref name="SWG:CtBM" /> Three [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] of the [[Corellian Security Force]], possibly alerted by the freighter's crew, tried to intercept the pirate's ship shortly thereafter, but were shot down after a short [[Starfighter combat/Legends|dogfight]].<ref name="SWG:DtCF">{{SWGcite|exp=JtL|type=space|Destroy the CorSec Fighters|Corellian system}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Bez'ox Mentzz'' appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:CtBM" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The ''Bez'ox Mentzz'' was added to the game with the release of the expansion pack [[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed|''Jump to Lightspeed'']] on [[October 27]], [[2004]]. It was the second target of a mission that was available to players when communicating with the Dantooine Space Station. The first target was the ''[[Shifty Prince]]'', the third and final target was the ''[[Lord's Mistress]]''.<ref name="SWG:CtBM" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
